limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No quantified AI-attributable spend, headcount, or capex figures disclosed in the excerpts; named internal generative AI tool deployment supports score 3 but not 4.

ai_narrative_concreteness: One deployed internal use case (generative AI document summarization/search) described without quantified results; score 4 reflects operational detail of a named deployed tool but no metrics.
capex_mentions: No dollar amounts tied to AI investment found in the excerpts; the $4.325 billion revolving credit facility is general corporate financing with no stated AI link.
Multiple references to 'Blackstone Holdings AI L.P.' in the excerpts are a legal entity name (a holding partnership), not an AI investment program — these were excluded from scoring.
Philanthropic donations to MIT and Oxford for AI-related academic programs (item_10) were noted but not counted as operational AI investment.
